commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: General. He occupied the same office as Putiphar, in Egypt. (Genesis xxxix. 1.) It was no disgrace for such a one to execute himself the king's order, as Banaias slew the brother of Solomon. (3 Kings ii.)

commentaries.author: Hippolytus of Rome
commentaries.content: Arioch, the captain of the king's guard (literally, the chief slaughterer or cook). For as the cook slays all animals and cooks them, of a similar nature was his occupation. And the rulers of the world slay men, butchering them like brute beasts.
